questions.assertion: Assertion (A): The narrator of The Portrait of a Lady is unnamed.
questions.reason: Reason (R): The narrator is a minor character and his lack of a name emphasizes his secondary role in the story.
opts: (A) Both A and R are true and R is the correct explanation of A
(B) Both A and R are true but R is not the correct explanation of A
(C) A is true but R is false
(D) A is false but R is true

(D) A is false but R is true
